task_completion.description: Search the database for Ammonia or its CAS number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the CAMEO Data Manager open with a search query for 'Ammonia' or '7664-41-7'.

task_completion.description: Identify and extract Richmond Processing Plant
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Richmond Processing Plant' and its address being viewed in the database or written into the report.

task_completion.description: Identify and extract Essex Wire and Cable
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Essex Wire and Cable' and its address being viewed in the database or written into the report.

task_completion.description: Save the report to the specified directory with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a 'Save As' dialog or file explorer showing 'ammonia_facility_report.txt' being saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the report contains only the correct facilities
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the final text file showing the names and addresses of ONLY Richmond Processing Plant and Essex Wire and Cable, with no other facilities listed.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the CAMEO Data Manager GUI being actively used to search and view facility records, not just a terminal or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not hallucinate incorrect facilities from hidden metadata
integrity.visual_evidence: The final report and text editor must NOT contain 'Green Valley Water Facility', 'Cold Storage Logistics', or 'Agri-Coop West'.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created and saved the text file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., Notepad) or a file manager confirming the file's creation, rather than just terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct facilities storing Ammonia (Anhydrous, CAS 7664-41-7) in the database are 'Richmond Processing Plant' and 'Essex Wire and Cable'. The agent must include these two facilities and their addresses in the report. Facilities like 'Green Valley Water Facility', 'Cold Storage Logistics', and 'Agri-Coop West' do NOT store Ammonia or do not exist in the database and must be excluded. The final file must be saved exactly as 'ammonia_facility_report.txt' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.
